title: cynoglossum rotundum
intro: Cynoglossum rotundum, also known as Round Hound's Tongue or Round Forget-me-not, is a perennial plant belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Cynoglossum rotundum include reducing inflammation, alleviating coughs, and relieving symptoms of allergies. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
